packageRules.description: Library peer dependencies (RN, Skia, Reanimated, Worklets, Gesture Handler) are the consumer's choice — never bump them here.
Group non-major devDependencies into a single review PR.
Group GitHub Actions bumps into a single review PR.

Expo SDK governs these versions — bump them with `npx expo install --fix`, never Renovate. Renovate tracks npm `latest`, which runs ahead of the SDK's pinned, mutually-compatible set (e.g. it proposed react-native 0.86 / worklets 0.9.2 / jest 30 while SDK 56 pins 0.85.3 / 0.8.3 / jest 29). Renovate still owns non-SDK tooling (eslint, GitHub Actions, @testing-library, react-doctor, husky).
